summary: S4 shipped Feature 2 (number-prefix addressing) AND the operator-reassigned Explorer UX revision. Feature 2 (verdict Q8-Q11): ai_router/resolve_set.py (resolve_slug/resolve_set exact integer-prefix match with leading-zeros normalized, collision names both, no-match lists available numbers + --next, no fuzzy nearest; next_session_set_number returns int + zero-padded string with width=max(3, widest existing prefix); resolve_session_set_dir bare-number->path passthrough; standalone CLI `python -m ai_router.resolve_set <n>`/`--next`/`--json`); start_session --session-set-dir now accepts a bare number resolving within ./docs/session-sets; authoring guide reconciled (NNN- monotonic sequence prefix REQUIRED for new/scaffolded sets, RECOMMENDED + forward-only for consumers, semantic date/phase names still banned, Numbering section added); minimal extension Command-Palette quick-input resolver command (dabblerSessionSets.resolveSetNumber) backed by a pure TS resolver (utils/resolveSetNumber.ts) mirroring the Python contract so router-less Lightweight consumers still get the handle. Explorer UX revision (operator-directed to S4; non-goal 'old schema OK, no per-row nag'): the intrusive '(needs migration)' row description is replaced by an unobtrusive asterisk + 'Ran under schema v<N>' hover tooltip (SessionSetsModel.migrationMarker/migrationTooltip; schemaVersionOnDisk surfaced from fileSystem.ts; rendered in client.js + tree.css); a single title-bar 'Upgrade older session sets' icon (commands/upgradeOlderSets.ts) gated on the dabblerSessionSets.hasSubCurrentSets context key runs the corrected THREE-migrator bulk chain (migrate_session_state -> migrate_lightweight_to_canonical_v4 -> migrate_v3_to_v4, each --in-place via Python subprocess) across all sub-current sets at once -- the S2 empirical correction, NOT the verdict's two. Per-row right-click migrate actions left intact (manual option, not a nag). Verification (manual; cross-provider deferred to S5 per the per-set pattern): Python 1025 passed / 1 skipped (15 new resolver + 2 new start_session integration tests, 0 regressions); TS test:unit 573 passing / 2 failing (BOTH pre-existing Set-026 stub-harness failures in configEditor-foundation + notificationsSection, unrelated to S4); tsc --noEmit clean; esbuild clean. Layer-3 migration-cta Playwright specs updated to assert asterisk+tooltip (not run locally -- CI-fragile launchVSCode); title-bar enabled/disabled gating unit-tested via hasSubCurrentSets (the package.json `when` clause is declarative). No router invoked; $0 added to the $10 set NTE. NOTE for S5 verifier: (a) confirm the THREE-migrator bulk chain order/correctness vs the verdict's two (S2 empirical correction carried forward); (b) the bulk-upgrade title-bar action shells to Python (the per-row v4 migrate stays in-process) -- a deliberate divergence since only v3->v4 has a TS in-process twin and the bulk path genuinely needs all three migrators; (c) cross-provider verification of S2-S4 deferred here is S5's to perform.

reason.specifics: S5 is the final session: consumer rollout (docs/cross-repo-migration-guard-notice.md), harvester first-adopter hook install (operator-scoped), publish the held v0.24.1 Copy-Slug fix, dual version bumps (PyPI dabbler-ai-router + Marketplace extension) + CHANGELOG + CLAUDE.md version walk + change-log.md, and the cross-provider verification of the S2-S4 deferred work (including the THREE-migrator bulk-chain correctness and the bulk-action-shells-to-Python divergence flagged above), then close-out with publishes held for operator tag-push. High effort: cross-repo coordination + release mechanics + the accumulated verification pass warrant it.
